fields.label: Content Title
fields.description: Title or label for this content block

fields.label: Channel
fields.description: Target channel for this content (leave empty for all channels)

fields.label: Apply to Variant Only
fields.description: Restrict this content to a specific variant (leave empty for all variants)

fields.label: Locale
fields.description: Target language/locale (leave empty for all locales)

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.description: Display order for this content block

fields.label: Active
fields.description: Whether this content block is currently active

fields.label: Valid From
fields.description: Start date for time-limited content (e.g., campaigns)

fields.label: Valid To
fields.description: End date for time-limited content (e.g., campaigns)

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Internal notes about this content block
